doc_title: Waters of the United States — EPA/Army Corps Final Rule
label: partial
reason: The document accurately reflects the real January 18, 2023 EPA/Army Corps final rule (88 FR 3004) but the "conformed by Sackett v. EPA (2023)" attribution is anachronistic since Sackett was decided in May 2023, after the rule's publication.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 62
REASON: The document cites a real final rule (88 FR 3004, January 18, 2023) and accurately represents actual EPA/Army Corps regulatory content, but the Sackett v. EPA (2023) conforming reference is problematic—Sackett was decided in May 2023, after the rule's January publication, making "conformed by" anachronistic and potentially fabricated as presented.
